"}, {"text": "If the Payment Method names don't match between each system you will encounter errors during the import of transactions"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "MYOB is case-sensitive, so you will need to match the formatting exactly as per Retail Express e.g. VISA is not the same as Visa."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#myob-file", "children": [{"text": "Create a MYOB file"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a MYOB file (for assistance with MYOB setup refer to "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://galaxy.maropost.com/home/leaving?allowTrusted=1&target=http%3A%2F%2Fhelp.myob.com%2Fwiki%2Fdisplay%2Far%2FCreate%2Ba%2Bcompany%2Bfile", "children": [{"text": "MYOB - Create a Payment Method"}]}, {"text": " or contact MYOB Support directly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Step 1 - Download the Setup Files from Retail Express"}], "data-id": "step-1-download-the-setup-files-from-retail-express"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Retail Express exports the setup files in a compressed format so the file is smaller and faster to download. Before importing these files into MYOB, these files will need to be extracted."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If you don't extract the files you will be unable to import the files into MYOB."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To download and extract the setup files ready for MYOB:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to"}, {"text": " Settings > Integrations > Accounting Data Export", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ignore the filters (these are used later when exporting data, not the Setup files)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Download Setup Files", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Save As", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Browse to your preferred location"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click Save"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Open the location where your files were downloaded"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Right-click the downloaded file"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Extract All", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select a location", "bold": true}, {"text": " for the files to be extracted to"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Remember this location when selecting the files to be imported into MYOB"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Extract", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You will see four .TXT files, the correct for direct import to MYOB. "}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "We always recommend performing a backup at this point, should you need to restore data for any reason"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once the backup has been completed, click "}, {"text": "Import", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The import will be processed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If you need to import another file click "}, {"text": "Import more data", "bold": true}, {"text": ", otherwise click "}, {"text": "Close", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Frequently Asked Questions"}], "data-id": "frequently-asked-questions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#warning-vs-error", "children": [{"text": "What's the difference between an "Error" and a "Warning" during import"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "During the import, you may encounter an error or a warning. Typically this means:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Warning", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Import has "}, {"text": "continued ", "bold": true}, {"text": "but there is something you should be aware of e.g. Invalid Tax Code, default substituted"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Error", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There was an issue with the import so that it will "}, {"text": "reject", "bold": true}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "those lines ", "bold": true}, {"text": "from"}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the import (the remainder of the import will continue to be processed)."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-497d974e"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you review the error log there will be a code to help you identify the appropriate record affected by the warning or error."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For example, looking at the below import log, there was an error (id -24) related to the Brand Collective line (import did not continue), and a warning (ID 257) related to the Gibson Brands line (import continued)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002534056/mceclip13.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://ress.zendesk.com/hc/article_attachments/360002534056/mceclip13.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip13.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
